name: Оса-дрон
description: A support variant that often feels worse than a normal wasp once it appears in a group. It prefers to stay back, heal allies, and force you to chase a target that almost never gives you a comfortable angle.
behavior: It shares part of the normal wasp's aerial pattern, but tries to stay farther back. It shoots, stabs when you close in, and emits a support scream that regenerates nearby wasps and can massively prolong already bad fights.
interactionWithPlayer: It spots you, creates distance, and starts sustaining the rest of the swarm. Alone it is manageable; alongside other wasps it becomes one of the most frustrating creatures in the game.
interactionWithCreatures: Как и обычная оса, она нейтральна к большинству существ, но враждебна к пчёлам и комарам. Несколько наземных существ убегают сразу при её появлении.
strategy: Isolating it and killing it first is still the priority. Even with a melee option, its real value comes from healing, repositioning, and leaving you stuck fighting a swarm that never really ends; that is why it feels above most non-bosses.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Удар жалом: 40. Выстрел жалом: 50. Крик: лечит по 15 в секунду в течение 10 секунд.

inflicts: Его удар жалом наносит колющий урон с накоплением яда, а выстрел жалом наносит дробящий урон.

abilities.name: Укол жалом
abilities.description: A direct blockable sting that applies 10 venom buildup.

abilities.name: Выстрел жалом
abilities.description: A stinger projectile that demands a shield or a dodge.

abilities.name: Крик
abilities.description: It grants nearby wasps a healing bonus of 15 health per second for 10 seconds.
